recommendations.title: The Bird with the Crystal Plumage
recommendations.overview: An American writer living in Rome witnesses an attempted murder that is connected to an ongoing killing spree in the city and conducts his own investigation, despite he and his girlfriend being targeted by the killer.

recommendations.title: Handling the Undead
recommendations.overview: On a hot summer day in Oslo, the dead mysteriously awaken, and three families are thrown into chaos when their deceased loved ones come back to them. Who are they, and what do they want?

recommendations.title: The 4th Floor
recommendations.overview: A woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor.

recommendations.title: Curtains
recommendations.overview: Six young actresses auditioning for a movie role at a remote mansion are targeted by a mysterious masked murderer.

recommendations.title: Deep Red
recommendations.overview: An English pianist living in Rome witnesses the brutal murder of his psychic neighbor. With the help of a tenacious young reporter, he tries to discover the killer using very unconventional methods. The two are soon drawn into a shocking web of demen

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
recommendations.overview: A tourist witnesses a murder and finds herself caught up in a series of bloody killings.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.

recommendations.title: The Boogey Man
recommendations.overview: A young girl witnesses the brutal murder of her stepfather at the hands of her brother, by mirror reflection. Years later, when the mirror is accidentally shattered, a dark and vengeful curse is unleashed on the family, and anyone unlucky enough to c

recommendations.title: Night of the Dark Full Moon
recommendations.overview: A man investigates the grisly crimes that occurred in a former insane asylum, unsettling the locals who all seem to have something to hide.

recommendations.title: No One Gets Out Alive
recommendations.overview: An immigrant in search of the American dream is forced to take a room in a boarding house and soon finds herself in a nightmare from which she can't escape.
